creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #12)

Well, on powerpc64 objdump for the sections shows
set_vnet as ALLOC (without listing READONLY).

elfdump and objdump do not seem to agree about
what the flags are for the same file in the
powerpc64 context.

elfdump shows all the sh_flags as empty.

So the difference in reported flags between
amd64 and powerpc64 may be just a tools issue.
